title: Physical Health Control
subtitle: Take control of your physical health with these interventions

content.text:
Physical Health Status

Your physical health score is 68/100. With targeted interventions, you can reach 85+ within 8 weeks.
content.headline: Health Score Assessment
content.body: Current score of 68 indicates good baseline health but with room for improvement. Main areas: sleep quality (65), exercise consistency (60), and nutrition (75). Improving these three areas can boost overall health to 85+.

content.text:
Current Health Metrics

Sleep Quality: 65/100 - Need 1.5 more hours
Exercise: 60/100 - Add 2 sessions weekly
Nutrition: 75/100 - Increase vegetables
content.headline: Key Health Metrics
content.body: Sleep is your biggest opportunity for improvement (currently 1.5 hours short of optimal). Exercise consistency needs 2 additional sessions per week. Nutrition is good but lacks vegetable variety.

content.text:
Specific Interventions

1. Sleep: Establish 10:30 PM bedtime (+20% improvement)
2. Exercise: Add Tuesday & Thursday sessions (+18%)
3. Nutrition: Add 2 veggie servings daily (+12%)
content.headline: Health Improvement Plan
content.body: Sleep intervention: Go to bed at 10:30 PM consistently (adds 1.5 hours). Add Tuesday and Thursday 30-minute exercise sessions. Include 2 additional vegetable servings daily in meals.

content.text:
8-Week Health Transformation

Week 1-2: Sleep routine adjustment
Week 3-4: Add exercise sessions
Week 5-8: Consolidate nutrition changes
content.headline: 8-Week Health Journey
content.body: Phase 1 (Weeks 1-2): Establish sleep routine. Phase 2 (Weeks 3-4): Add exercise sessions and see energy improvements. Phase 3 (Weeks 5-8): Solidify nutrition habits. Expected result: 85+ health score.
